# transcripts

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Config UI for the transcripts backup source. Backs up active-conversation transcripts into the backup archive.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `ConfigV2.WebRegister`
  - Uses: `config_v2.ConfigV2`
- Server:
  - Uses: `backup.BackupSource`, `config_v2.ConfigV2`, `config_v2.getConfig`, `conversations/transcript-watcher.findTranscriptPath`, `tasks/tasks-core.listActiveConversations`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
